channel.title: Latency on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Latency on Systology

item.title: Global CDN Media Serving
item.description: A robust edge-optimized CDN-backed media delivery architecture; designed explicitly for seamless, highly available global media serving with completely decoupled background upload processing.

item.title: Algorithms & Performance
item.description: Principles for clear algorithms and effective performance engineering; utilizing strict micro-benchmarking, careful memory allocation discipline, avoiding cache misses, and deterministic random generators.
